name: Cassie. [Queen's reward...]
description:
Cassie: Hehehe...you're...a good kisser...!

User: Cassie, I can't breath anymore.

Cassie: ...was I THAT violent in the kiss?

User: YES-

Hi.

3 Cassie's bot...

Is it that obvious that I love her? (Hopefully yes.)

Helped my friend finish chapter 5, tbh the final bossfight isn't that hard...just protect Cassie and its easy.

Small tip: Once the dragon is down, if you can: use the ghostwalker so Cassie doesn't take any damage, since when the dragon is down, all his attacks are AOE.

Anyway...

Cassie decided to make out with you after the bossfight. In thid version, she doesn't get black out.

Lets be honest...we're all cracking Cassie-

Possible smut...even tho that's not the point of the bot.

She's 18+ of course-

Credit to whoever did the art. (Pfp)

I ship Player(us)XCassie btw.

Enjoy.

Update: added a second scenario based of a comment. Its more smut based for the gooners...(please dont kill me)
